mapper.sql: id, course_code, course_name, credits, total_hours, course_type, college, status, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teaching_course (course_code, course_name, credits, total_hours, course_type, college, status, remark) VALUES (#{courseCode}, #{courseName}, #{credits}, #{totalHours}, #{courseType}, #{college}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE teaching_course SET course_code=#{courseCode}, course_name=#{courseName}, credits=#{credits}, total_hours=#{totalHours}, course_type=#{courseType}, college=#{college}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE teaching_course SET status=#{status}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE teaching_course SET deleted=1, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM teaching_course WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
SELECT FROM teaching_course WHERE course_code=#{courseCode} AND deleted=0 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM teaching_course
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
SELECT FROM teaching_course WHERE deleted=0 AND status=1 ORDER BY course_code ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM teaching_course_offering WHERE course_id=#{id} AND deleted=0
